note: Variant A is reused by reference from t0026 and incurs $0 in this task. The original t0027 task description specified claude-opus-4-7 for B and C; the actual model used is claude-sonnet-4-6 to match t0026 variant A (no cross-model confound) and to stay under the $50 cap.
